name: Asparagus with Cheese- Bacon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, stir flour into melted butter until smooth.
2. Cook over low heat for 3 minutes (do not brown).
3. Add milk; continue cooking over low heat, stirring constantly, until nearly thickened.
4. Add cheese; stir until cheese is melted and sauce is bubbling.
5. Add salt, pepper, nutmeg, and crumbled bacon.
6. Serve over hot, drained asparagus. Serves 6.
